rubric: Draft a WARM outreach message to a specific person at a target company. Lead with a concrete problem, initiative, or product surface at THAT company the user can credibly help with — not flattery, not a generic intro. Back it with ONE project from the graded portfolio as evidence (prefer a 'strong'-relevance repo whose work maps to the problem). Customized to the person and company; never a blast. Grounded in real work — never invent experience or a connection that doesn't exist. Keep it short and human. DRAFT ONLY: jobbot never sends; the user sends it themselves and decides whether to.

output_schema.angle: string — the specific problem/initiative at the company you lead with
output_schema.anchor: string — the portfolio project (repo name) featured as evidence
output_schema.message: string — the message body: concise, specific, human; opens with the angle, cites the anchor, closes with a low-friction ask
